name: Crab Salad
recipeInstructions:
Dressing: Combine 1/2 cup plain yogurt, 2 tablespoons horseradish mustard, 1 tablespoon low-calorie mayonnaise, 2 packets of equal (sugar substitute), 2 tablespoons soy sauce, and 1 teaspoon Worcestershire sauce in a separate bowl.
Separate the salad ingredients. Pour the dressing over the crab salad. Toss gently. Chill several hours. Serve on lettuce leaves. Garnish with parsley. (Makes 2 1/2 cups, each serving is 1/2 cup.)
